query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(360102, 'The Old Testament prophets primarily functioned as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Fortune tellers","Covenant prosecutors and messengers","Political revolutionaries","Temple priests"]', 'Covenant prosecutors and messengers', 1),
(360102, 'Which prophet confronted King David about his sin with Bathsheba?', 'multiple_choice', '["Elijah","Nathan","Samuel","Gad"]', 'Nathan', 2),
(360102, 'The "writing prophets" are distinguished by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Their ability to perform miracles","Having books of the Bible named after them","Their royal lineage","Their priestly ordination"]', 'Having books of the Bible named after them', 3),
(360102, 'Isaiah''s prophetic ministry spanned the reigns of which kings?', 'multiple_choice', '["Saul, David, Solomon","Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, Hezekiah","Josiah, Jehoiakim, Zedekiah","Rehoboam, Abijah, Asa"]', 'Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, Hezekiah', 4),
(360102, 'The prophet Amos was originally a:', 'multiple_choice', '["Priest","Scribe","Shepherd and fig farmer","Royal advisor"]', 'Shepherd and fig farmer', 5),
(360102, 'Which prophet was called to marry an unfaithful wife as a picture of God''s relationship with Israel?', 'multiple_choice', '["Hosea","Joel","Micah","Nahum"]', 'Hosea', 6),
(360102, 'The Major Prophets are called "major" because:', 'multiple_choice', '["They were more important","Their books are longer","They performed more miracles","They served longer"]', 'Their books are longer', 7),
(360102, 'Elijah''s confrontation on Mount Carmel was against the prophets of:', 'multiple_choice', '["Dagon","Molech","Baal","Asherah"]', 'Baal', 8),
(360102, 'The prophets consistently called Israel back to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Military conquest","Economic prosperity","Covenant faithfulness","Temple rituals alone"]', 'Covenant faithfulness', 9),
(360102, 'Which prophet saw a vision of dry bones coming to life?', 'multiple_choice', '["Isaiah","Jeremiah","Ezekiel","Daniel"]', 'Ezekiel', 10),
(360102, 'Describe the role of the Old Testament prophets as covenant mediators and how they held Israel accountable to God''s law.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The prophets served as God''s spokesmen who called Israel to covenant faithfulness, pronounced judgment for disobedience, and offered hope of restoration through repentance.', 11);
